data.title: Trump Administration Softens Gaza Takeover Proposal As Middle East Allies Reject Plan
data.description: Trump administration dialed back its Gaza proposal after global backlash. US not committing troops or funds. Proposal complicates peace talks.

data.title: $100 Invested In This Stock 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
FormFactor Stock Falls On Q4 Earnings Miss, Weak Guidance As 'Slow Demand' Continues In Q1
data.description: FormFactor shares are diving in extended trading Wednesday after the company reported fourth-quarter financial results that came up short of analyst expectations.

data.title: Elon Musk's Lenders Cash In $5.5 Billion On Thanks To Investor Demand For X Loans: Report
data.description: Banks have successfully sold $5.5 billion in loans tied to X Corp., the social media platform owned by Elon Musk, amid surging investor demand.

data.title: DOGE Gains Access To Medicare And Medicaid Systems: Elon Musk Says, 'This Is Where The Big Money Fraud Is Happening'
data.description: Elon Musk-led Department of Government Efficiency has secured access to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, according a report Wednesday. The extent of the access and the systems involved are yet to be clarified.
